privileged_info_summary: The task creates a quiz named 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' in the BIO101 course ('Introduction to Biology'). The quiz has a 60-minute time limit (3600 seconds), allows 1 attempt, and requires exactly 2 multiple-choice questions to be added. All metadata claims match the task specification and are validated by the verifier script which queries the Moodle MariaDB database. The data source is a real Moodle instance at http://localhost/moodle, not synthetic.
